behaviors.description: Speech-to-text output preserves speaker labels for attendee attribution in summaries.
behaviors.justification: Failure depends on real speech-model diarization quality (speaker separation/label stability), which a stub transcript would hide. Rejected Workflow: behavior text targets one model boundary (STT label preservation), not a required multi-agentic chain.
behaviors.test_description: Use real meeting audio with multiple speakers against the real STT API (diarization enabled). Assert transcript chunks contain consistent speaker labels and that labels are preserved into the summarizer input mapping for attendee attribution.

behaviors.description: Transcript parsing extracts explicit task assignments (assignee + task text) into summary input structure.
behaviors.justification: This behavior is parser logic on transcript text to structured fields; a local function/object test can catch extraction errors. Rejected Integration: behavior text is about extraction itself, not cross-module state handoff failure.
behaviors.test_description: Feed parser fixtures with explicit assignment phrasings and speaker tags; assert extracted records include correct assignee and task text fields in the summary-input structure.

behaviors.description: Live summary includes at least one action item for each attendee assigned a task.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on real LLM summarization behavior (coverage/completeness of action-item generation per assignee). Deterministic stubs would mask omissions. Rejected Workflow: can isolate with a real transcript input and single summarization decision boundary.
behaviors.test_description: Provide a real or realistic transcript with multiple explicit assignees to the live summarizer using the real LLM. Assert every assignee present in assignments appears with >=1 action item in output.

behaviors.description: Decision extraction logic routes identified decisions into `decisions` schema, not narrative fields.
behaviors.justification: Behavior text focuses on routing logic after decisions are already identified; this is deterministic schema-mapping logic at a local boundary. Rejected Agentic: no requirement here to validate model judgment quality, only field placement.
behaviors.test_description: Call decision-routing mapper with fixtures of pre-identified decision items plus narrative text; assert decision items populate `decisions` and are excluded from generic narrative fields.

behaviors.description: Key transcript decisions appear in live summary `decisions` section, not buried in narrative.
behaviors.justification: This tests whether the real LLM surfaces and classifies important decisions correctly in output sections; stubbed outputs would trivially pass and hide real misses. Rejected Workflow: can be validated on a single real summarization step from transcript to summary.
behaviors.test_description: Run real LLM summarization on transcripts containing clear decision statements. Assert those decisions are present in `decisions` and absent as only narrative mentions.

behaviors.description: For audio longer than 60 minutes, service segments, processes sequentially, and merges into one coherent summary.
behaviors.justification: Requires multiple agentic steps in sequence (per-segment STT/summarization plus merge behavior). Coherence and cross-segment completeness failures emerge only across the chained pipeline. Rejected Agentic: behavior text explicitly requires segmented sequential processing and merged coherence, i.e., multi-step orchestration.
behaviors.test_description: Use a real >60-minute recording. Execute chunking pipeline end-to-end with real model calls; assert all segments processed in order, merged output is schema-valid, and cross-segment action items/decisions are preserved without major duplication/omission.

behaviors.description: Full pipeline (upload, transcribe, summarize, deliver structured output) completes automatically for a real meeting recording.
behaviors.justification: This is an end-to-end, no-manual-intervention requirement spanning real I/O and multiple model-dependent stages; failures often emerge at stage handoffs and cumulative agentic behavior. Rejected System: real infra alone is insufficient because success also depends on model outputs across sequenced stages.
behaviors.test_description: Run a production-like E2E job with a real meeting file through upload -> STT -> LLM summary -> delivery. Assert completion without human steps, successful handoffs, and valid structured output containing required sections.
